sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, value Nullable(Int32), created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 10), (2, 'Bob', NULL), (3, 'Charlie', 20);
SELECT id, groupArray(value)(name) FROM test_table WHERE value <> 10 GROUP BY id HAVING count(id) > 1;
SELECT id, groupArray(name)(value) FROM (SELECT id, name, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery GROUP BY id ORDER BY id ASC;
SELECT id, groupArray(value)(name) FROM test_table WHERE NOT (value <> 20) GROUP BY id HAVING arrayJoin(groupArray(name)(value)) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, groupArray(value)(name) FROM (SELECT id, CAST(value AS String) AS value_string FROM test_table) AS inner_query GROUP BY id HAVING groupArray(name)(value_string) <> groupArray(value)(name);
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, category String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT t.id, groupArray(t.name)(t.value) FROM test_table AS t JOIN another_table AS a ON t.id <> a.id GROUP BY t.id HAVING count(t.name) < 5;
SELECT id, groupArray(name)(groupArray(value)(name)) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL OR value <> 10 GROUP BY id ORDER BY created_at DESC;
